hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | python3 -c 'import sys,json,re; cmd=sys.stdin.read().strip(); has_lake=bool(re.search(r"\blake\s+build\b",cmd)); m=re.search(r"\btimeout\s+(\d+)\s+lake\s+build\b",cmd); print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: lake build must include timeout <= 300, e.g. cd /Users/chronoai/automath/lean4 && timeout 300 lake build"}} if has_lake and not m else {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: lake build timeout must be <= 300 seconds."}} if m and int(m.group(1)) > 300 else {"continue": True}))'
ps -eo pid,etimes,comm 2>/dev/null | awk '$3=="lean" && $2>300 {print $1}' | while read -r pid; do kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; echo '{"continue":true}'
